name: validate_dod
description: Run the Bubbles state-transition guard against a spec dir. Validates DoD evidence (markdown OR tool-log), scope status, transition gates, and returns the full guard output (stdout + stderr + exit code) verbatim. Use when an agent claims a spec/scope is 'done' and you need machine-verifiable proof.

spec_dir.description: Spec directory relative to repo root, e.g. 'specs/045-foo'.

revert_on_fail.description: If true, the guard reverts the spec's state.json from 'done' on failure.
